narrative:
Reminderville C (precinct in Summit County) has 1,129 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.2 percentage points.
